task-task-mratyg3g-03rnzuz4-description.localValue: Completed. Runtime JSON Schema validation now checks `.pinake/pinake.json` and `.pinake/.state/*.json` against the shipped schemas during validation. A formal `Pinakes: Upgrade Pinake` flow upgrades legacy `Pinake/` folders into `.pinake/docs`, preserves discovered documents and legacy module flags, rebuilds state/index files, and records migration history.
task-task-mratyg3g-03rnzuz4-description.remoteValue: Partially completed. The manifest has been refactored to the new `.pinake/pinake.json` source-of-truth shape, the JSON schema was updated, validation now checks document paths/frontmatter/ADR names, and legacy `Pinake/` folders can be safely copied into `.pinake/docs`. Remaining work: runtime JSON Schema execution, a formal upgrade command, migration history application, and deeper compatibility handling.

task-task-mratyg3g-g98b588w-description.localValue: Completed. Validation now includes runtime JSON Schema checks, Markdown style warnings with line numbers, a standalone dependency-free validator with text/JSON/GitHub output, packaged CLI entrypoints, and a command that generates `.pinake/tools/validate-pinake.mjs` plus `.github/workflows/pinake-validate.yml`.
task-task-mratyg3g-g98b588w-description.remoteValue: Partially completed. The current refactor added richer manifest/document validation and expanded VS Code extension tests around `.pinake` storage, legacy copy migration, Explorer settings merge, TreeView preview/edit behavior, and favorites. Remaining work: markdownlint, output formats, CLI or CI callable validator, and GitHub Actions workflow support.

task-task-mratyg3g-lscjyvjc-title.remoteValue: Completed: Pinake storage contract inside Pinake/

task-task-mratyg3g-lscjyvjc-description.localValue: Updated the storage contract to use `.pinake/pinake.json` as the source of truth, `.pinake/docs` for documentation, and `.pinake/.state` for generated local state. The old visible `Pinake/` folder is now treated as legacy input for safe copy migration.
task-task-mratyg3g-lscjyvjc-description.remoteValue: Moved generated Pinake-owned state under Pinake/, including Pinake/pinake.json, Pinake/.pinake/*, and Pinake/.gitignore.

task-task-mratyg3g-p3kiqv3z-description.localValue: Completed the current TreeView UX scope: the Pinake tree is generated from `pinake.json` when available, document clicks open Markdown Preview by default, source editing is exposed through an explicit context action, and existing reveal/copy/properties/sort/rename/delete actions remain available.
task-task-mratyg3g-p3kiqv3z-description.remoteValue: Basic tree actions exist. Finish Explorer-like behavior: richer context actions, keyboard coverage, reveal/copy path/properties, sorting, and polished open behavior.

task-task-mratyg3g-q6phgvy4-description.localValue: Completed the current Pinake setup wizard scope: users select a documentation template, choose optional modules with template defaults, explicitly confirm whether `.pinake` should be hidden from the VS Code Explorer, and generate `.pinake/docs` from data-driven template/module definitions.
task-task-mratyg3g-q6phgvy4-description.remoteValue: Basic preset/module selection exists. Build the full wizard flows for Backend, Frontend, Fullstack, Microservice, Library, and Mobile with conditional questions.

task-task-mratyg3h-tzauzd4b-description.localValue: Completed. Added `Pinakes: Upgrade Pinake` / `pinakes.upgrade` to normalize current manifests, convert legacy `Pinake/` content into `.pinake/docs`, preserve user documents, sync state/version files, rebuild the index, and record migration history.
task-task-mratyg3h-tzauzd4b-description.remoteValue: Implement pinakes upgrade behavior that reads schema versions, applies migrations, records history, and preserves user documents.

task-task-mratyg3h-4kpsma35-description.localValue: Completed. Runtime JSON Schema validation is active for `.pinake/pinake.json` and `.pinake/.state/*.json`, and Markdown style validation now reports trailing whitespace, tab indentation, duplicate or missing H1s, and unclosed fenced code blocks.
task-task-mratyg3h-4kpsma35-description.remoteValue: Integrate Markdown lint checks and runtime validation for Pinake/pinake.json plus Pinake/.pinake/*.json, reporting actionable errors.

task-task-mratyg3h-jbtztjti-description.localValue: Completed. Added `scripts/validate-pinake.mjs` and the `pinake-validate`/`npm run pinake:validate` entrypoints so validation can run outside VS Code with text, JSON, or GitHub annotation output.
task-task-mratyg3h-jbtztjti-description.remoteValue: Expose validation outside the VS Code command path so CI and developers can run the same checks from scripts.

task-task-mratyg3h-kvpgcvdn-description.localValue: Completed. Added `Pinakes: Generate CI Validation Workflow`, which writes a standalone validator into `.pinake/tools/` and a GitHub Actions workflow that runs it on pushes and pull requests.
task-task-mratyg3h-kvpgcvdn-description.remoteValue: Add a command or template to create a GitHub Actions workflow that validates Pinake structure on pull requests.

task-task-mratyg3g-txcl4tcy-description.localValue: Completed. The local index now stores heading metadata, tags, links, backlinks, broken references, and graph edges; search supports snippets plus tag:/heading: filters and improved ranking; changed and deleted Markdown documents can update the index incrementally.
task-task-mratyg3g-txcl4tcy-description.remoteValue: Completed. The local index now stores heading metadata, tags, links, backlinks, broken references, and graph edges; search supports snippets plus tag:/heading: filters and improved ranking.

task-task-mrc7hmkn-a353nn8o-description.localValue: Completed. Added docs/interface-audit.md with a native VS Code interface inventory, friction points, design principles, Light/Dark/High Contrast acceptance notes, keyboard and screen reader expectations, and implementation-ready recommendations that avoid a custom webview.
task-task-mrc7hmkn-a353nn8o-description.remoteValue:
Create a focused UX/UI and visual design audit for the Pinake VS Code extension interface.

Scope the native sidebar, creation wizard, module picker, search results, validation output, properties output, command feedback, and empty states. The outcome should define modern, intuitive, minimalist, and functional design principles that future implementation tasks can follow without introducing a custom webview.
